Class UdpDiscoveryService

java.lang.Object
edu.desu.cis.robot.discovery.UdpDiscoveryService
All Implemented Interfaces:
RobotDiscovery
public class UdpDiscoveryService extends Object implements RobotDiscovery
An implementation of the RobotDiscovery interface that uses UDP broadcast to discover robots on the local network. This service sends a discovery message and listens for responses from available robots.

    discover(String robotId)

  • Method Details

    • discover

      public DiscoveredRobot discover(String robotId)
      Discovers a robot with the specified ID using UDP broadcast. It sends a discovery message to all broadcast addresses and waits for a response.
      Specified by:
      discover in interface RobotDiscovery
      Parameters:
      robotId - The ID of the robot to discover.
      Returns:
      A DiscoveredRobot object containing the robot's details.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if no robot is found within the timeout or if an error occurs during discovery.
